feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [ERI1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack E101A15 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 27, 11:00 - 13:00 UTC

Mar 3, 20:43 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our dedicated servers offer.

Start time : 27/04/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 27/04/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during the maintenance for 90 minutes each.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our infrastructure, we will be relocating the servers currently located in rack E101A15 to rack ERI0102F03B.

Thank you for your understanding.
